description_long: This is a compact, military-style rifle with a matte black finish and a minimalist, skeletonized folding stock. The receiver is rectangular and robust, with a prominent magazine well and a straight, boxy magazine inserted. The barrel is relatively short and unadorned, extending from the front of the receiver with no visible muzzle device. The pistol grip is angular and functional, positioned below the receiver for ergonomic handling. A simple iron sight is mounted on top, and the overall design emphasizes portability and utilitarian function, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a skeletonized folding stock, short barrel, and box magazine, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, skeletonized folding stock, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end and the slim profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open, skeletal structure of the stock and the back of the receiver.
